metadata.description: Dependency-aware optimization engine for any codebase. Scan, plan, isolate, measure, repeat — all in Git worktrees.

plugins.name: autoresearch-wrapper
plugins.description: Dependency-aware autoresearch engine: /autoresearch-wrapper runs scan + guided wizard. Includes /autoresearch-wrapper-run (optimization loop), /autoresearch-wrapper-status (state summary), /autoresearch-wrapper-flow (metric history + plot), /autoresearch-wrapper-create (multi-candidate feature comparison), /autoresearch-wrapper-delete (post-deletion optimization), and /autoresearch-wrapper-monitor (live progress polling).
